name: qihang
description: 启航优选 — AI 原生多身份浏览器

scripts.audit:report: cd packages/agent && uv run audit.py report
scripts.audit:verify: cd packages/agent && uv run audit.py verify
scripts.pack:mac: pnpm build && pnpm protect && cd packages/shell && pnpm pack:mac
scripts.pack:win: pnpm build && pnpm protect && cd packages/shell && pnpm pack:win
